text:
Chapter 03 (FlashAttention & PagedAttention) review verdict: APPROVED.

Review report written to: instances/vllm/artifacts/03-flashattention-pagedattention/reviews/review-report.json

Key findings:
- All 9 review dimensions PASS
- 0 blocking formula issues (27 non-blocking warnings)
- 0 source grounding issues
- Line number references verified accurate against actual implementation file
- Chapter underwent complete rewrite between initial review and final review — significantly improved structure (7 sections), added kitchen analogy for memory wall, height-ranking analogy for online softmax

Please record this delivery and notify the book-editor.
